description_long: This object consists of three gold bars stacked in a pyramid formation, with two bars forming the base and one bar resting on top. Each bar has a smooth, highly reflective surface with a rich golden hue and a distinct shine, suggesting a polished metallic finish. The top faces of the bars are slightly beveled, and the letters 'Au' are faintly visible, referencing the chemical symbol for gold. The bars are rectangular with rounded edges, and their surfaces are free of any intricate engravings or gemstones. The overall appearance is solid, heavy, and exudes a sense of value and wealth. The arrangement is simple and geometric, emphasizing the luxurious material rather than decorative detail.
description: A stack of three polished gold bars with smooth, reflective surfaces and a simple, geometric arrangement. The bars are rectangular, heavy-looking, and display a rich golden color.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pyramid stack of three gold bars, with the top bar centered above two base bars and the 'Au' marking faintly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular profile of the stacked bars, with the smooth, reflective surfaces and no visible markings.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the same pyramid arrangement and the reflective golden surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stacked bars' profile and their polished finish.
